blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,979 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
